saveFailed: Failed to save changes, please retry
selectMessagesToDelete: Please select messages to delete first
selectMessagesToCopy: Please select messages to copy first
selectMessagesToExport: Please select messages to export first
confirmDeleteTitle: Are you sure you want to delete the selected {count} messages?
confirmDeleteDescription: This action will be recorded until you click the save button.
roomPasswordDialogDescription: Room {roomName} requires a password to access
roomRedirectedToast: This room has switched to a new address. Please navigate to continue.
roomRedirectDescription: This room has switched to a new address: {path}. To continue, please navigate to the new address and log in again.
unsavedChangesWarning: Unsaved message changes or ongoing uploads detected. It is recommended to complete or back up before navigating.
copyFailedDescription: The browser blocked automatic clipboard access. Please copy it manually.
copyLinkFailed: Failed to copy link. Please copy it manually.
manualCopyDescription: The browser blocked automatic clipboard access. The content below is selected for you. Press Ctrl+C or Cmd+C to copy it.
manualCopyShortcut: On public HTTP pages, Chrome may disable automatic copying; selecting and copying text manually still works.
